# External pixel-art assets

- GothicVania Town by Luis Zuno / Ansimuz, downloaded from https://opengameart.org/content/gothicvania-town. The OpenGameArt page marks the pack CC0 / public domain.
- Magical Road Pixel Art Environment by Ansimuz, downloaded from https://opengameart.org/content/magical-road-pixel-art-environment. The OpenGameArt page marks the pack CC0.
- Kenney Pixel Platformer tiles, downloaded from https://kenney.nl/assets/pixel-platformer. Kenney publishes this pack under CC0.
- Kenney UI Pack - Pixel Adventure, downloaded from https://kenney.nl/assets/ui-pack-pixel-adventure. Kenney publishes this pack under CC0.
